market_context:

Median nightly rate: £104.90
Median 90-day occupancy: 48.9%
Median photo count: 23

title_variants: Kelham Island Retreat – Private Balcony, 6 Guests
analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience the buzz of Kelham Island right from a modern riverside retreat. This freshly refurbished entire‑unit apartment sleeps up to six guests across two spacious double bedrooms, each fitted with a king‑size twin bed that can be split into singles on request. The open‑plan lounge and kitchen flows seamlessly, featuring an L‑shaped double sofa‑bed, sleek appliances, ample counter space and all the utensils you need to whip up a meal. Step out onto your private balcony and soak in uninterrupted river views – the perfect backdrop for sunrise coffee or sunset drinks. Self‑check‑in and lift access make arrival effortless, while a designated parking space removes any hassle of street parking. The unit is professionally cleaned before each stay and comes stocked with essentials – hair‑dryer, shampoo, conditioner, towels and more. No parties are allowed, ensuring a peaceful environment for all guests. Located steps from Kelham Island’s thriving pubs, bars and restaurants, you’ll be at the heart of Sheffield’s most vibrant riverside scene. Enjoy an automatic 10% discount on weekly stays and 20% off monthly stays, applied at checkout. Book now for a stylish, convenient base with river views and all the comforts of home.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the balcony river‑view shot as the cover photo – it instantly showcases the most marketable feature and differentiates the listing from competitors.
key_diagnosis: Your nightly rate (£109) is only 4% above the market median (£104.90) yet you have 44 open nights, leaving ≈£4,800 of unearned revenue – consider a targeted discount or dynamic pricing to boost occupancy.
The current title omits high‑impact keywords like “river view” and “parking”; adding these can improve click‑through rates.
Your photo set is strong, but the cover image isn’t the river‑view balcony; swapping it to that shot can instantly showcase the best view and attract more bookings.
analysis.outreach_hook: You have 44 open nights this quarter, representing about £4,800 of potential earnings at your current £109 rate.
